titles.romaji: Pokémon Fushigi no Dungeon: Shutsudou Pokémon Kyuujotai Ganbaruzu!
titles.english: Pokémon Mystery Dungeon: Team Go-Getters Out of the Gate!
titles.native: ポケモン不思議のダンジョン 出動ポケモン救助隊ガンバルズ！
synonyms: Pocket Monsters Advanced Generation - S3 Pokemon Mystery Dungeon: Team Go-Getters Out of the Gate!
titles.tmdb_title: Pokémon Mystery Dungeon: Team Go-Getters out of the Gate!

description:
A human wakes up one day to discover that he has become a Squirtle in a world filled with natural disasters, where he meets Charmander and Chikorita of Team Go-Getters, a Pokemon rescue team. Squirtle joins Team Go-Getters for the task of saving Pichu's Brother Pikachu from Skarmory, however Gengar and his Team Meanies decide to interfere.

(Source: Anime News Network)
